cases.expected_acs:
.nature-app { sound-mood: organic; }
@sound my-tone { body { tones: 440hz, 660hz; decays: 0.5s, 0.35s; gain: 0.3; } }

.game { sound-mood: retro; }
@sound my-blip { body { osc: square; freq: 880hz; decay: 80ms; gain: 0.3; } }
